mapper.select:
select t.topic_id, t.teacher_id, u.nick_name as teacher_name, t.title, cast(t.description as char(10000) character set utf8mb4) as description, t.skills, t.keywords, t.category_id, c.category_name, t.max_students, t.status, t.del_flag, t.create_time from project_topic t left join sys_user u on u.user_id = t.teacher_id left join project_category c on c.category_id = t.category_id where t.del_flag = '0' and t.status = 'Open'
and (lower(t.title) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') or lower(cast(t.description as char(10000) character set utf8mb4)) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') or lower(t.skills) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%'))
and t.category_id = #{categoryId}
and lower(u.nick_name) like concat('%', lower(#{teacherName}), '%')
order by t.create_time desc

select count(1) from project_topic t left join sys_user u on u.user_id = t.teacher_id where t.del_flag = '0' and t.status = 'Open'
and (lower(t.title) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') or lower(cast(t.description as char(10000) character set utf8mb4)) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') or lower(t.skills) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%'))
and t.category_id = #{categoryId}
and lower(u.nick_name) like concat('%', lower(#{teacherName}), '%')

select t.topic_id, t.teacher_id, u.nick_name as teacher_name, t.title, cast(t.description as char(10000) character set utf8mb4) as description, t.skills, t.keywords, t.category_id, c.category_name, t.max_students, t.status, t.del_flag, t.create_time from project_topic t left join sys_user u on u.user_id = t.teacher_id left join project_category c on c.category_id = t.category_id where t.del_flag = '0'
and (lower(t.title) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') or lower(cast(t.description as char(10000) character set utf8mb4)) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') or lower(t.skills) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%'))
and t.category_id = #{categoryId}
and lower(u.nick_name) like concat('%', lower(#{teacherName}), '%')
order by t.create_time desc

select count(1) from project_topic t left join sys_user u on u.user_id = t.teacher_id where t.del_flag = '0'
and (lower(t.title) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') or lower(cast(t.description as char(10000) character set utf8mb4)) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') or lower(t.skills) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%'))
and t.category_id = #{categoryId}
and lower(u.nick_name) like concat('%', lower(#{teacherName}), '%')

select t.topic_id, t.teacher_id, u.nick_name as teacher_name, t.title, cast(t.description as char(10000) character set utf8mb4) as description, t.skills, t.keywords, t.category_id, c.category_name, t.max_students, t.status, t.del_flag, t.create_time from project_topic t left join sys_user u on u.user_id = t.teacher_id left join project_category c on c.category_id = t.category_id where t.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and t.del_flag = '0' order by t.create_time desc

select t.topic_id, t.teacher_id, u.nick_name as teacher_name, t.title, cast(t.description as char(10000) character set utf8mb4) as description, t.skills, t.keywords, t.category_id, c.category_name, t.max_students, t.status, t.del_flag, t.create_time from project_topic t left join sys_user u on u.user_id = t.teacher_id left join project_category c on c.category_id = t.category_id where t.topic_id = #{topicId} and t.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into project_topic (teacher_id, title, description, skills, keywords, category_id, max_students, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time) values (#{teacherId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{skills}, #{keywords}, #{categoryId}, #{maxStudents}, #{status}, '0', #{createBy}, now())
mapper.update: update project_topic set title = #{title}, description = #{description}, skills = #{skills}, keywords = #{keywords}, category_id = #{categoryId}, max_students = #{maxStudents}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where topic_id = #{topicId}
